title: `hier` data is empty in calls to VL_FINISH_MT or VL_STOP_MT

features.name: assert property inside module instantiation
features.description: Code should include an assertion statement using assert property keyword inside a module that is instantiated multiple times to create a hierarchical path
features.snippet:
module child; assert property (@(posedge clk) req); endmodule
module top; child c1(); child c2(); endmodule

features.name: finish system task inside module instantiation
features.description: Code should include a $finish system task call inside a module that is instantiated within another module to create a hierarchical path
features.snippet:
module child; initial begin if(condition) $finish; end endmodule
module top; child c1(); endmodule

features.name: fatal system task inside module instantiation
features.description: Code should include a $fatal system task call inside a module that is instantiated within another module to create a hierarchical path
features.snippet:
module child; always @(posedge clk) if(data == 'x) $fatal; endmodule
module top; child c1(); endmodule
